#observational data compiled for use in Choksi, Gnedin, and Li 2017
#stellar masses for VCS and LG dwarves (NGC147,185,6822) calculated using colour-dependent mass to light ratio (Bell et al., 2003); for HST-BCG galaxies calculated using constant M/Lv = 6
#VCS globular cluster metallicities were computed using the color-metallicity transform of Harris et al., 2017:   (g-z) = 1.513 + 0.481[Fe/H] + 0.051 [Fe/H]^2.
#HST-BCG globular cluster metallicities were computed using the color-metallicity transformation of Harris et al., 2006: (B-I) = 0.375[Fe/H] + 2.158\ and then scaled to the VCS calibration as described in Eq. 10 of CGL17 
#NGC 147, 185 GC data from Veljanoski et al., 2013; color-metallicity transform of Harris et al., 2017:  and (g-i) = -.268 + .856(g-I) --> (g-I) = 1.77 +.428[Fe/H] + .045[Fe/H]^2 and  
#NGC 6822 data from Veljanoski et al., 2015; same color-metallicity transform as VCS
#if the peak of the metal-poor, red mode has [Fe/H] < -1.0, we instead use a unimodal distribution centered on the metal-poor (blue) mode and disregard the red mode, setting it to a dummy value of 9999
#galaxyID | logSM | Mean [Fe/H] of GCs | Error of Mean | Dispersion [Fe/H] of GCs | Error of Dispersion | Blue peak | Red peak (9999 if unimodally blue) 
NGC147 8.0 -1.96252708271 0.182 0.546 0.136 -1.963 9999
NGC185 8.4 -1.87119322827 0.062 0.177 0.047 -1.871 9999
NGC6822 8.1 -1.36531997066 0.147 0.415 0.111 -1.365 9999
